correction_note: phase0q_001 stress_oos_policy.json derived its coverage from DAILY market series (BAML OAS family, full-series start 2016-09-07). That was the wrong consumer: those series feed the regional snapshot (macro_ingestion), while the open_macro_v03 decision path reads PIT vintages of the SEED_SOURCES basket via macro_observation_vintage (src/workers/quadrant_macro.py never reads latest-revision macro_data). This policy supersedes the 001 coverage_policy section; 001 artifacts remain frozen as the historical record.

decision_input_authority.source_of_truth: src/macro_sources.py SEED_SOURCES; PIT selection semantics of src/macro_pit.py latest_vintage_as_of

measured_vintage_coverage.max_available_at: 2026-06-15 (INDPRO); MICH lags at 2026-04-24 - flagged for monitoring

reduced_6to7of8.note: axis_score renormalizes weights over the available subset; quadrant coverage/u_floor mechanics already model reduced baskets

sleeve_price_coverage.note: GFC_2008 window is fully covered on the price side; vintage side is reduced-coverage there

out_of_sample.note: primary window grew from ~9.8y (001 estimate) to ~12.3y, raising expected folds from 6 to 9
